name: svi-erp
description: Solo Vehículos Impecables — ERP/CRM con landing, portal extranet y panel privado.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='node_modules/.bin/next';if(fs.existsSync(p)&&fs.statSync(p).size===0){console.log('🔧 WSL detected — rebuilding bin symlinks...');require('child_process').execSync('npm rebuild --bin-links',{stdio:'inherit'})}"
